result.stdout:
Description:
  A command line tool for a Hot Chocolate Fusion.

Usage:
  fusion [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compose
  subgraph  Subgraph commands.
  export    Export commands.

commands.payload:
Description:
  A command line tool for a Hot Chocolate Fusion.

Usage:
  fusion [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compose
  subgraph  Subgraph commands.
  export    Export commands.

result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  fusion compose [options]

Options:
  -p, --package, --package-file <package-file> (REQUIRED)
  -s, --subgraph, --subgraph-package-file <subgraph-package-file>
  --package-settings, --package-settings-file, --settings <package-settings-file>
  -w, --working-directory <working-directory>                                      [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-hotchocolate.fusion.commandline-15.1.12-488589a8507a47ca8d284ac3c323ca7e]
  --enable-nodes
  -r, --remove <remove>
  -?, -h, --help                                                                   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Subgraph Config Set commands.

Usage:
  fusion subgraph config set [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  name <name>  Set the name of a subgraph.
  http         Set the graphql-http settings for a subgraph.
  web-socket   Set the graphql-ws settings for the subgraph.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Subgraph Config Set commands.

Usage:
  fusion subgraph config set [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  name <name>  Set the name of a subgraph.
  http         Set the graphql-http settings for a subgraph.
  web-socket   Set the graphql-ws settings for the subgraph.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Set the graphql-http settings for a subgraph.

Usage:
  fusion subgraph config set http [options]

Options:
  --url <url> (REQUIRED)                       The url of the graphql-http endpoint.
  --client-name <client-name>                  The name of the graphql-http configuration.
  -c, --config, --config-file <config-file>    The subgraph configuration file.
  -w, --working-directory <working-directory>  [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-hotchocolate.fusion.commandline-15.1.12-488589a8507a47ca8d284ac3c323ca7e]
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a Fusion subgraph package.

Usage:
  fusion subgraph pack [options]

Options:
  -p, --package, --package-file <package-file>
  -s, --schema, --schema-file <schema-file>           The subgraph schema file.
  -c, --config, --config-file <config-file>           The subgraph configuration file.
  -e, --extension, --extension-file <extension-file>  The subgraph schema extension files.
  -w, --working-directory <working-directory>         [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-hotchocolate.fusion.commandline-15.1.12-488589a8507a47ca8d284ac3c323ca7e]
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
